column55: CM didn’t show proper empathy. They missed using simple phrases like ‘sorry’ or ‘thank you’ at the right time when responding to the customer’s feelings.

column197: Forwarded To TSG Product and Service

column136: The customer expressed strong frustration regarding their Vehicle Tracker Pro order. Although the device was successfully delivered to the customer on 24 June 2026 at 4:00 PM, no one has contacted them since, and the physical installation has not yet been completed.
column169: To ensure a professional customer experience, floor members must avoid making side noise while agents are on a call. Noise disruptions from exiting or nearby staff can distract the agent and negatively impact the quality of the service provided.
